title: Eva TV Series to stream on Hulu Japan
display_title: Eva TV Series to stream on Hulu Japan
wikitext:
[]: Eva TV Series to stream on Hulu Japan             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Dec 10, 2014 10:35 pm Not sure if this is related to the Bluray boxset next Summer, but: tweet-body — twitter-user (@username) date document.querySelectorAll('blockquote.twitter-tweet > a').forEach((t) => t.href = t.href.replace('x.com', 'twitter.com')) Anno really does want the series (and EoE, I'd assume) fresh in our minds before FINAL, doesn't he?

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Wed Dec 10, 2014 11:19 pm Or he just needs money Eva 20th anniversary won't be so fresh in people's minds when Shin Eva comes out in 2018

[]:             Quote Post by AR-99 » Thu Dec 11, 2014 1:28 am The thing is to release gradually, not all at once.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Thu Dec 11, 2014 4:19 am I wonder if some scenes will be cut like it happened in the previous TV screen, I'm talking about THAT scene in EoE.
summary: []: Eva TV Series to stream on Hulu Japan             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Dec 10, 2014 10:35 pm Not sure if this is related to the Bluray boxset next Summer, but: tweet-body — twitter-user (@username) date document.querySelectorAll('blockquote.twitter-tweet > a').forEach((t) => t.href = t.href.replace('x.com', 'twitter.com')) Anno really does want the series (and EoE, I'd assume) fresh in our minds before
